payload.answer: Extracted architectural decisions and preserved the listed unresolved questions as open questions.

payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram and model choice remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: The input provides architectural statements but no request to resolve or merge an existing entity.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural decisions and open questions from a chat summary about Brain architecture.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for Brain.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.

details: Committed durable architecture decisions with high confidence.
Preserved Telegram and model-selection items as open questions rather than decisions.
No conflicts or superseded facts were detected.
